summary: Health Monitor — Datadog metrics exporter integration
description_md:
As a workspace-admin, I want the Health Monitor to export connector metrics to Datadog so that I can correlate data pipeline health with application performance and set up unified alerts.

The Connector Health Monitor needs to expose operational metrics to external observability platforms. Datadog is the primary APM solution used by enterprise tenants for infrastructure monitoring and alerting.

**Acceptance Criteria**:

1. Health Monitor exposes a Datadog exporter that pushes connector status, latency, and error rate metrics every 60 seconds
2. Exported metrics include tags for tenant, workspace, connector type, and data source name
3. Workspace admin can enable/disable Datadog export per workspace via the Connector Health Monitor UI
4. Datadog API key and application key are stored as encrypted workspace secrets and never logged in plain text

comments.author: dev2@amisol-demo.example
comments.body_md: Datadog exporter implemented using StatsD protocol. Awaiting QA validation of metric cardinality.
